name: Flexoki
description: Warm analog color scheme inspired by paper, ink, and the tactile nature of writing.

preview.sampleText: Inspired by the warmth of paper and the flow of ink.

classes.h1: text-3xl font-bold mb-6 leading-tight text-[#100f0f] dark:text-[#cecdc3] border-b border-[#e6e4d9] dark:border-[#282726] pb-3
classes.h6: text-sm font-semibold mb-2 text-[#6f6e69] dark:text-[#878580] uppercase tracking-wide
classes.a: text-[#24837b] dark:text-[#3aa99f] hover:text-[#205ea6] dark:hover:text-[#4385be] underline underline-offset-2 transition-colors
classes.tr: border-b border-[#e6e4d9] dark:border-[#282726] odd:bg-[#fffcf0] even:bg-[#f2f0e5] dark:odd:bg-[#100f0f] dark:even:bg-[#1c1b1a]
classes.th: p-3 font-semibold text-left border-b-2 border-[#cecdc3] dark:border-[#403e3c] text-[#100f0f] dark:text-[#cecdc3] bg-[#f2f0e5] dark:bg-[#1c1b1a]
classes.blockquote: border-l-4 border-[#af3029] dark:border-[#d14d41] pl-4 italic my-4 py-2 text-[#6f6e69] dark:text-[#878580] bg-[#f2f0e5] dark:bg-[#1c1b1a] rounded-r
classes.code: px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono text-sm text-[#af3029] dark:text-[#d14d41] bg-[#f2f0e5] dark:bg-[#1c1b1a]
classes.pre: p-4 rounded overflow-x-auto font-mono text-sm bg-[#f2f0e5] dark:bg-[#1c1b1a] text-[#100f0f] dark:text-[#cecdc3] border border-[#e6e4d9] dark:border-[#282726]
